projects.name: RetroXperience
projects.overview: Full-stack movie browsing platform built with Python and Django.
projects.simple_explanation: A movie browsing website where users can explore movies, rate them, and view average ratings.
projects.problem_solved: Helps users discover movies easily and share ratings using a structured backend system.

projects.name: EpicOutlet
projects.simple_explanation: An online shopping website where users can register, add products to cart, and manage favorites.
projects.problem_solved: Simplifies online shopping with authentication, cart management, and API integration.

projects.name: EpicOutlet AI Chatbot
projects.type: AI-Powered Customer Support Chatbot for Django E-Commerce
projects.overview: An intelligent chatbot integrated into the EpicOutlet e-commerce platform that assists users with product search, recommendations, and shopping-related questions.
projects.simple_explanation: A smart chatbot on the shopping website that helps users find products, answer questions, and guide them while shopping.
projects.problem_solved: Improves customer experience by providing instant answers, helping users find products faster, and reducing the need for manual customer support.

projects.name: Weather Dashboard
projects.problem_solved: Provides real-time weather information for users using API data.
